heading: Kennesaw Mountain National Battlefield Park boundary
label: 430t–1 Kennesaw Mountain National Battlefield Park boundary
notes: Definition of “Secretary”Secretary means the Secretary of the Interior, see , set out as a note under .section 2 of Pub. L. 116–9section 1 of this title

children.heading: Map
children.label: 1 Map
children.text: The term “map” means the map entitled “Kennesaw Mountain National Battlefield Park, Proposed Boundary Adjustment”, numbered 325/80,020, and dated February 2010.

children.heading: Park
children.label: 2 Park
children.text: The term “Park” means the Kennesaw Mountain National Battlefield Park.

children.heading: Kennesaw Mountain National Battlefield Park boundary adjustment
children.label: b Kennesaw Mountain National Battlefield Park boundary adjustment

children.heading: Boundary adjustment
children.label: 1 Boundary adjustment
children.text: The boundary of the Park is modified to include the approximately 8 acres of land or interests in land identified as “Wallis House and Harriston Hill”, as generally depicted on the map.

children.heading: Map
children.label: 2 Map
children.text: The map shall be on file and available for inspection in the appropriate offices of the National Park Service.

children.heading: Land acquisition
children.label: 3 Land acquisition
children.text: The Secretary may acquire land or interests in land described in paragraph (1) by donation, purchase from willing sellers, or exchange.

children.heading: Administration of acquired land
children.label: 4 Administration of acquired land
children.text: The Secretary shall administer land and interests in land acquired under this section as part of the Park in accordance with applicable laws (including regulations).
